form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on March 30 over 400m at Maitland behind Layton Magic beaten 5.5 lengths (22.69) in a Grade 5. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th on March 30 over 400m at Maitland behind Layton Magic beaten 5.5 lengths (22.69) in a Grade 5. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Could manage only sixth last time but caught the eye the start prior when he clocked a solid 22.41 over 400m finishing second at Maitland. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at Dubbo over 318m (18.64) beating Mahome Girl in Grade 5 on March 28. Can go well again with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at Dubbo over 318m (18.64) beating Mahome Girl in Grade 5 on March 28. Can go well again with the right run.

form.formComment: Has been in the money at last three starts, the latest when second (19.62) at Bulli. Tricky draw to overcome. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the money at last three starts, the latest when second (19.62) at Bulli. Tricky draw to overcome. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.15) in a Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths fifth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.15) in a Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths fifth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Others rate better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Nearing entrance to home straight checked off heels and raced wide.
Shifted out in the first turn and came together.

form.formComment: Could manage only seventh last time but impressed the start prior when she recorded a decent 22.42 over 400m finishing third at Maitland. Has the ability and looks an each way chance.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (20.25) over 350m at this track. Jumps from the outside. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (20.25) over 350m at this track. Jumps from the outside. Has to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering the turn out of the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 20.20, beating Kert Kert. Last start finished 4th over 330m at Temora beaten 9 lengths (19.10) behind Son Of Bianca in a Grade 5 on March 18. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 365m at Nowra beaten 12 lengths (21.79) behind Angry Friendship in a Grade 5 on April 2. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.
